scripts.dev: concurrently "sh -c 'dashboard_port=${DASHBOARD_PORT:-7888}; cd ../.. && bun --watch run cli/selftune/dashboard-server.ts --port $dashboard_port --runtime-mode dev-server'" "sh -c 'dashboard_port=${DASHBOARD_PORT:-7888}; vite_port=${VITE_PORT:-5199}; echo \"Waiting for dashboard server on localhost:${dashboard_port}...\"; i=0; max=150; until curl -fsS http://localhost:${dashboard_port}/api/health >/dev/null 2>&1; do i=$((i+1)); if [ \"$i\" -ge \"$max\" ]; then echo \"Dashboard server did not become healthy within 30s\"; exit 1; fi; sleep 0.2; done; echo \"Dashboard server healthy; starting Vite on localhost:${vite_port}.\"; vite --strictPort --port ${vite_port}'"
